name: RQ-4 Global Hawk
description: High-altitude long-endurance unmanned surveillance aircraft providing persistent wide-area ISR coverage. Can survey 100,000 square kilometers per day from 60,000+ feet altitude.

specialAbilities.name: Wide-Area Surveillance
specialAbilities.description: Multi-spectral sensors can image 100,000 sq km per day, mapping entire theaters of operation in a single sortie.

specialAbilities.name: Airborne SIGINT
specialAbilities.description: Onboard SIGINT package intercepts enemy communications and radar emissions across vast areas.
